raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased an animal petting session for my kids. At no point during the purchase process was it disclosed that this is a non-refundable purchase. I attempted to cancel the the service and the merchant wouldn't refund my purchase. 

I filed a dispute with Citi credit card billing department and after some time, they just decided in favor of merchant without even hearing my side of the story. I tried E-mailing and calling the multiple times, to no avail.
